issues.description: Card has two distinct effects that must be represented in DSL: (1) 'This Character cannot be K.O.'d by effects' - a passive protection effect, and (2) '[Blocker]' - an activated ability. Effects array is empty.
Missing protection effect: 'cannot be K.O.'d by effects' should be represented as a passive/always-active effect that prevents KO actions targeting this card.
Missing Blocker activated ability: Should trigger when opponent declares attack, allow rest of this card to redirect attack target to this card.

effects.description: After opponent declares attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack
